summary: Iteration 7: Tested all Chat, Push Notification, and Typing Indicator features after MessagesPage.js rewrite. Found and fixed one critical bug: frontend sent image_url: null causing 422 from backend. After fix, all features work correctly.

minor.issue: Backend model image_url: str = '' does not accept null (422). Frontend was sending null when no image. Fixed in frontend by sending empty string instead.

integration_issues.issue: Was failing with 422 because image_url: null was sent. Fixed: changed `currentImage || null` to `currentImage || ''` in MessagesPage.js line 149

critical_code_review_comments: Backend MessageCreate model has image_url: str = '' but should be Optional[str] = None or Optional[str] = '' to avoid ambiguity. The current setup rejects null values, which is a footgun.
seed_data_creation: Sent test messages: TEST_iter7_hallo vom Kunden, Enter-Taste Test!, Send-Button Test!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 fully verified: 1) Enter key sends message (stale closure fix via useRef works) 2) Send button works 3) Polling every 2s works - studio sees customer messages without page reload 4) Conversation sidebar shows correct name + last message 5) No redirect to /login on polling (fault-tolerant) 6) VAPID key endpoint returns key 7) POST /api/notifications/subscribe accepts subscription 8) Typing POST/GET API works, is_typing=true confirmed 9) BUG FIXED: image_url: null -> image_url: '' in MessagesPage.js sendMessage. Test accounts: test_customer@inkbook.com / Test1234!, test_studio@inkbook.com / Test1234!
rca_of_issue: Root cause: MessagesPage.js sendMessage function passed `image_url: currentImage || null` to POST /api/messages. When no image was selected, currentImage was empty string (''), so `'' || null` = `null`. Backend Pydantic model `image_url: str = ''` does not accept null (422 Unprocessable Entity). Fix: `currentImage || ''` ensures empty string is sent instead of null.
